title: Mattress Cleaning Machine
description: Portable handheld mattress cleaner combining 3000 RPM eccentric vibration for mite dislodgement, 800 W HEPA suction (H13 filter), and UV-C LED (254 nm) sterilisation, Arduino-monitored.
objective: Remove ≥ 99% dust mites; HEPA H13 filtration; UV-C 40 mJ/cm² dose; 30 min battery runtime; < 3 kg weight.
constraints: 24 V 5 Ah Li-Ion; 800 W suction motor; BOM < ₹6000; Arduino filter blockage monitor.
supporting_fact_titles: Mattress Cleaning — Vibration Beater and HEPA Suction
design_element_titles: Mattress Cleaning Machine — Beater + HEPA Suction + UV-C Head
UV-C LED Germicidal + Ozone Sterilisation Module
DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control

element_usage_notes.Mattress Cleaning Machine — Beater + HEP: Eccentric motor 3000 RPM + 800 W suction + UV-C 20 mW/cm² LED.
element_usage_notes.UV-C LED Germicidal + Ozone Sterilisatio: 254 nm LEDs, 40 mJ/cm² at 0.05 m/s pass speed.
